title: Rheumatoid Arthritis Relief: 7 Herbal Teas for Obese People
description: Cinchona officinalis teas have been used for centuries to help manage symptoms of rheumatoid arthritis, a chronic condition that causes inflammation and pain in the joints. The teas are rich in quinine, a compound that has anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties. Quinine works by inhibiting the production of prostaglandins, which are hormone-like substances that cause pain and inflammation.
